name: get_block
content:
Role-based access control
(RBAC) shall support at least four predefined roles: Admin, Manager, Editor,
and Viewer. Custom roles shall be configurable per organization.

name: get_block
content:
All data shall be
encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Key rotation
shall occur automatically every 90 days.

function.name: patch_block
function.arguments: {"id":"req-2","content":"Role-based access control\n(RBAC) shall support at least four predefined roles: Admin, Manager, Editor,\nand Viewer. Custom roles shall be configurable per organization and this applies to all enterprise tenants."}

function.name: patch_block
function.arguments: {"id":"req-6","content":"All data shall be\nencrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Key rotation\nshall occur automatically every 90 days; this applies to all enterprise tenants."}

content: Updated req-2 and req-6 to include enterprise-tenant applicability.
